name: midas
description: Midas — Sistema patrimonial de largo plazo

scripts.test:critical: npm run test:motor && tsx src/App.localReadOnlyCloudFallback.test.ts && tsx src/App.lazyPages.test.ts && tsx src/components/SimulationPage.test.ts && tsx src/components/AssistedSimulationPage.test.ts && tsx src/components/OptimizationLightPage.test.ts && tsx src/domain/optimizer/rvRfDecisionProfiles.test.ts && tsx src/domain/model/localReadOnlyCloudFallback.test.ts && tsx src/domain/model/m8InputFingerprint.test.ts && tsx src/domain/model/resultConfidence.test.ts && tsx src/domain/model/simulationRunGate.test.ts && tsx src/domain/bucketLab/bucketLab.test.ts
scripts.test: sh -c 'set -e; for f in $(rg --files src | rg "\\.test\\.ts$"); do npx tsx "$f"; done'
